requirement_topic.en: Battery and charger evidence for cordless tools
requirement_topic.zh: 无绳电动工具的电池与充电器证据
requirement_topic.zht: 無繩電動工具的電池與充電器證據

summary.en: For Saudi-bound cordless tools, battery packs and chargers should be documented as part of the scoped technical package. SASO filing typically separates the tool model from replaceable energy components where possible, and evidence must identify battery chemistry, charge power, and protection design for the exact variant and market declaration.
summary.zh: 对于进入沙特的无绳工具，电池组和充电器应纳入适用范围文件包。SASO报备通常会按工具型号与可替换能源部件分别管理，且证据需明确电池化学体系、充电功率和保护设计，且与具体变体和市场申报一致。
summary.zht: 對於進入沙特的無線工具，電池組和充電器應納入適用範圍文件包。SASO報備通常會按工具型號與可替換能源部件分別管理，且證據需明確電池化學體系、充電功率和保護設計，並與具體變體與市場申報一致。

standards_or_laws: SASO technical application for lithium battery safety through IEC-based references where required
SABER product model filing requiring component-level clarity for batteries and chargers
IECEE pathway documents requiring test report alignment with national differences

summary.en: Chinese exporters normally rely on China domestic battery documentation and CNAS-backed safety data for lithium battery packs and power supplies, but these are domestic conformance records and do not replace Saudi component-level mapping under import filing rules.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常采用中国国内电池文件与CNAS背书的锂电池组和电源安全资料，但这属于中国合规记录，不可替代沙特报备下对电池和充电模块的部件级映射。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常採用中國國內電池文件與CNAS背書的鋰電池組和電源安全資料，但這屬於中國合規記錄，不可替代沙特報備下對電池和充電模組的零件級映射。

standards_or_laws: CCC and domestic lithium-battery related testing references used in China
CNAS/NIMCB lab reports for tool battery safety and charger safety in Chinese manufacturing context

gap.en: Common gap: one combined China report for the tool plus pack is often accepted in supplier systems but incomplete for Saudi, where tool, battery pack, and charger scopes are handled separately in practical filing practice.
gap.zh: 常见差距是中国侧常见将工具与电池包归并为一份报告，而沙特实践中常按工具、电池组与充电器分别管控，从而产生单一报告缺口。
gap.zht: 常見差距是中國側常見將工具與電池組歸併為一份報告，而沙特實務中常按工具、電池組與充電器分別管控，從而產生單一報告缺口。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory when battery-powered tool models and chargers fall within the scoped SASO technical category and import control route
mandatory_status.cn: Domestic battery documentation is mandatory only within Chinese supply obligations and must be supplemented for Saudi

source.publisher: Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat tool, battery, and charger as separate but linked filing elements in Saudi dossiers, and avoid using single aggregate evidence unless your conformity body explicitly accepts that scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在沙特文件中应将工具、电池和充电器作为独立但关联的报备要素处理，除非合格机构明确接受，否则不要以单一合并证据替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在沙特文件中應將工具、電池和充電器作為獨立但關聯的報備要素處理，除非合格機構明確接受，否則不要以單一合併證據替代。

requirement_topic.en: Nominal supply and frequency difference for Saudi power-tool operation
requirement_topic.zh: 沙特供电电压/频率差异与工具运行
requirement_topic.zht: 沙特供電電壓/頻率差異與工具運行

summary.en: Saudi commercial and industrial supply context is based on 230/400V at 60 Hz for many applications, so Chinese exporters should verify nameplate, insulation, control software, and motor start/torque profiles against the Saudi target variant. Mismatch handling should be documented in conformity records before issue of PCoC or SCoC.
summary.zh: 沙特多数应用场景采用230/400V、60Hz供电，出口商需核查名称牌、绝缘等级、控制软件及电机起停和扭矩特性与沙特目标版本一致。差异处理必须在合规文件中明确记录后才能进行PCoC或SCoC申请。
summary.zht: 沙特多數應用場景採用230/400V、60Hz供電，出口商需核查標牌、絕緣等級、控制軟體及電機啟停和扭矩特性與沙特目標版本一致。差異處理必須在合規文件中明確記錄後才能進行PCoC或SCoC申請。

standards_or_laws: Saudi Arabian Grid Code nominal frequency and voltage references
SASO-required technical documentation showing tested operating conditions
SASO 2203 and related electrical interface controls when applicable

summary.en: Chinese production baselines commonly reference 220/380V and 50Hz electrical contexts for many fixed-tool and industrial-grade motor families. This may be sufficient for domestic channels but is not enough evidence for Saudi 230/400V 60Hz entry without validation.
summary.zh: 中国的生产基线对许多工具和电机型号通常以220/380V、50Hz为默认设计和测试场景。该基线可支持国内流通，但在未做验证前不足以作为沙特230/400V、60Hz入场证据。
summary.zht: 中國的生產基線對許多工具和電機型號通常以220/380V、50Hz為預設設計和測試場景。該基線可支持國內流通，但在未做驗證前不足以作為沙特230/400V、60Hz入場證據。

standards_or_laws: Domestic Chinese electrical design defaults used in manufacturing for voltage and frequency
Domestic Chinese test reports from NIMCB/CNAS-accredited labs for 50 Hz operation

gap.en: The gap is operational, not only documentary. A tool that is stable on Chinese domestic power may require retest, recalibration, or firmware update for Saudi frequency and phase conditions, and this must be reflected in the import package and shipment release files.
gap.zh: 该差距具有运行属性，不是纯文件化问题。中国市场稳定的工具在沙特频率与相系条件下可能需要复测、校准或固件更新，且必须反映在进口包和放行文件中。
gap.zht: 該差距具有運行屬性，不是純文件問題。中國市場穩定的工具在沙特頻率與相系條件下可能需要複測、校準或韌體更新，且必須反映在進口包和放行文件中。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory technical confirmation for power-tools where operation can be affected by voltage and frequency differences
mandatory_status.cn: Domestic 50 Hz configuration is mandatory for China markets but needs extension for Saudi 60 Hz entry

source.publisher: Saudi Electricity Company (Saudi Electricity Grid Code)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Before shipment, validate every tool model against Saudi 230/400V 60Hz conditions in design files and test evidence; do not rely on 220/380V 50Hz domestic reports to cover Saudi market-entry risk.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出货前应在设计文件和测试记录中验证每个型号在沙特230/400V 60Hz条件下的表现，不要用中国220/380V 50Hz报告覆盖沙特入场风险。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出貨前應在設計文件和測試記錄中驗證每個機型在沙特230/400V 60Hz條件下的表現，不要用中國220/380V 50Hz報告覆蓋沙特入場風險。
